acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors after adding fix.ts
fix.ts exports fixStructural, fixSemantic, and fixQuality with inline prompt templates that invoke claude-cli and return revised document content
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) fix.ts exports three functions: fixStructural(), fixSemantic(), fixQuality(). (2) Each function accepts a document (content string or path) and failure details (array of issues from the corresponding ring). (3) fixStructural handles Ring 0 failures — deterministic fixes where possible, LLM-based for non-trivial issues. (4) fixSemantic handles Ring 1 failures — invokes claude-cli with a prompt that includes the parent document for alignment. (5) fixQuality handles Ring 2 failures — invokes claude-cli with a prompt requesting minimum changes to pass the rubric. (6) Fix prompt templates are defined inline in fix.ts (not imported from per-level modules). (7) Each function returns the revised document content as a string. PASS if all seven hold; FAIL if any is missing.
